seo.title: Ksenia Isidorova — Applied AI & AI Operations Specialist
seo.description: Applied AI engineer that builds custom AI solutions around real workflows — from research and prototyping to testing, integration and continuous improvement.

hero.introBefore: I build custom AI solutions and integrate them into
hero.introAfter: — from use-case discovery and rapid prototyping to integration, onboarding, support and continuous improvement.
hero.toolLine: Building with Codex, Claude Code, agents, APIs and automation workflows.

profile.kicker: Broad AI expertise. Deep technical foundation.
paragraphs: I work at the intersection of applied AI, product thinking and technical delivery. My background combines production experience in global game companies, SMEs and AI startups.

I take AI work beyond the experiment stage: Performing an AI audit, framing the problems, discovering actual solutions, building prototypes and final builds, testing with real workflows, documenting the process, setting up team pipelines and guides and testing&improving the system after launch.
I am especially interested in complex AI systems that help professionals reducing their time spent on repetitive, boring day-to-day tasks and make more room for creative work.

impact.label: less art production time through custom AI workflows
downloads for a large-scale product I contributed to
technical proficiency in a Tech Art team within four months
delivery from research and prototypes to onboarding and support

approachSection.description: AI is not a one-off experiment. I care whether a tool solves a real problem, fits the workflow, can be repeated by the team and continues to improve after launch.

approach.title: Discover
approach.text: Find real workflow bottlenecks and define where AI can create value.

approach.title: Prototype
approach.text: Use Codex, Claude Code, APIs, n8n and existing AI tools to build fast working versions.

approach.title: Integrate
approach.text: Connect tools to team workflows, document usage and support adoption.

approach.title: Improve
approach.text: Evaluate output, collect feedback, debug issues and iterate after launch.

workSection.headingBefore: AI systems that teams can actually use
workSection.description: Multi-agentic systems, internal chat-bots and tools — designed around real workflows and set up for real users, with post-integration support and personalized usage guides&presentations.

projects.title: Game development Applied AI solutions
projects.type: Enterprise R&D · Glera Games / Vizor Apps
projects.summary: Full-cycle AI systems for production teams: use-case research, dataset strategy, model training, evaluation, workflow design, environment setup, documentation, onboarding and post-delivery support. The focus is not only model quality, but whether the system can be used, repeated and improved by the team.

projects.title: Internal AI Automation & Assistants
projects.summary: Internal AI tools for operational teams: n8n workflows, multi-agent automations, Slack-integrated assistants and department-specific ChatGPT and Gemini bots for analytics, research, documentation and daily workflows. Built around practical team needs, fast prototyping, testing and iteration.

projects.title: Reading Mentor
projects.summary: A prototype-to-product experiment that turns TXT and EPUB books into an interactive learning flow with voice interaction, contextual explanations, vocabulary memory and pronunciation feedback. Built as a testbed for rapid AI product development, tool calling, voice interfaces and learning workflows.

projects.title: SWANA Cultural AI Models
projects.summary: Work on culturally aware generative AI initiatives focused on SWANA-region representation, localized model behavior and bias reduction. Contributions include dataset preparation, model evaluation, prompt testing, culturally specific visual QA and human-in-the-loop review.

projects.title: Metaheads AI
projects.summary: An applied AI studio concept focused on turning business and creative workflows into practical AI systems: research, workflow mapping, prototype design, generative pipelines, automation logic and reusable solution patterns.

experience.role: AI Art Researcher · Generative AI Specialist
experience.text: Own full-cycle AI R&D and internal AI operations: researching use cases, designing datasets, training and evaluating models, building custom GPT and Gemini tools, prototyping automations, integrating workflows into production, documenting systems, onboarding users and supporting teams after delivery.
Led technical delivery for a Unity and INK product across content systems, UI, animation and VFX. Built C# and Python tools, improved cross-team workflows and maintained implementation documentation.

Shipped two large-scale free-to-play products, automated production tasks, debugged and optimised complex content systems, led feature implementation and raised the department’s technical proficiency through training and mentorship.

Worked directly with small teams and varied clients, translating open-ended needs into practical technical and creative solutions. Led delivery from initial concept through implementation, iteration and production support.

education.label: Education
education.school: Southern Ukrainian National Pedagogical University, Odesa

furtherLearning.label: Further learning
furtherLearning.text: Automation with Python · Motion Design · Illustration · Brand Identity · 2D Platformer Development with Unity
